title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Starbucks India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Starbucks India
jsonLd.description:
Starbucks India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Starbucks India:
Starbucks India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India!
